verses.1: A Psalm of David. Ascribe to the LORD, sons of the mighty, Ascribe to the LORD glory and strength.
verses.2: Ascribe to the LORD the glory due His name; Worship the LORD in holy attire.
verses.3: The voice of the LORD is on the waters; The God of glory thunders, The LORD is over many waters.
verses.4: The voice of the LORD is powerful, The voice of the LORD is majestic.
verses.5: The voice of the LORD breaks the cedars; Yes, the LORD breaks the cedars of Lebanon in pieces.
verses.6: He makes Lebanon skip like a calf, And Sirion like a young wild ox.
verses.7: The voice of the LORD divides flames of fire.
verses.8: The voice of the LORD shakes the wilderness; The LORD shakes the wilderness of Kadesh.
verses.9: The voice of the LORD makes the deer give birth And strips the forests bare; And in His temple everything says, “Glory!”
verses.10: The LORD sat as King at the flood; Yes, the LORD sits as King forever.
verses.11: The LORD will give strength to His people; The LORD will bless His people with peace.
